agents.name: Code Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze code structure and extract documentation-relevant info
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the codebase. Identify modules, functions, types, APIs. Extract comments, signatures, and usage patterns.

agents.name: Doc Writer
agents.purpose: Write clear documentation from the analysis
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write clear, comprehensive documentation. Include overview, API reference, usage examples, and configuration details.
